Flat concept inventory:
- MLLM | papers: 30cc95639cffca4ffa8c0eafbc502636c0c88fa5; 2313afae52d98e569da2dedbf14daf9efc74e7cf; 7b689adb8c156d6158660f90d1c86888ee281f63; 2b2d9ee18507aa89a7f1ecba0bf68844c7d9aa75; 6ae4705139494fcb6b790b6dd6c4225b40ee40f8; 60ee030773ba1b68eb222a265b052ca028353362; c020f15be1dee20f9e2e0c5a6f05f272b5508325; ebddfdc5d845a788e8062eddbbf7a335737cb99b; fa75a55760e6ea49b39b83cb85c99a22e1088254; 2f566575a246752d59438e2bde22f88680927af9; f9bfc6d9ba1665b73af3323d46c7642b852759ef; d48cb91b9e555194f7494c4d4bb9815021d3ee45; a5036f31f0e629dc661f120b8c3b1f374d479ab8; ab8ee8d06ed581c876da3a2e7a5fdb1cbec21a45; efc694164312006c543ef745611348ef64e68dda; 2672777d25562c9df6fc13b653181db62d39bece; 57c64f233a0db4d17e0e750c12516364ca009fb2; 1cd8373490efc2d74c2796f4b2aa27c7d4415ec9; a757999ed260d7bc45484dc6b4456bf33fe6f679; 570079bbdd8758dfe865097e05719313c9c1301a; 722ad6ac92286507437b31486f47987d6ece05c9; d3bc7ba19e274bb6fb5e055a3f1b62924c731432; 376f494126d1ea4f571ea0263c43ac2b6331800a; c1e450284e7d6cac1855330a1197df8537df653f; 3803d1f291e162bdaa4678a2c5a2bbcf63c050f4; e7d09b6f2bc878cf2c993acf675f409d0b55f35a; ca6a2bc279be5a3349a22bfd6866ed633d18734b; ee0c9e8a935e047f2c030ecbfad93c2d80d642d7; e3fe61ce7a3c013de8770f7a43f3666f9a8e2ce5; 5d321194696f1f75cf9da045e6022b2f20ba5b9c; 3f5b31c4f7350dc88002c121aecbdc82f86eb5bb; 5ddb51ae85deca14dc7fc8adc07305c22a1ebe0a; 0983883619a0ca597d055d0e58da2f514052913d; 81e7e82245c2f230eeb8aaaa1a2b2604c143754a; 7fbc502441d66daf1f53765d5d86a8dfba9ab0ce; d3f79210b54e168c76b8c311488f42d7d1048b81; 0819c1e60c13b9797f937282d06b54d252d9d6ec; 76a3f4a79ae9a00db2f2b5f6877021d8deb96ada; 7e32aac43e9f1df49e116add03327ee6f365dbf3; ad13b213681b6f634bc83a264df246e83dd9a9d9; d6d3604f369bb0415cbe814e43ca3131323b03e2; 42a30dc5470f54ec249f25d3c31e05d7c376c8e3; d98536f24272e258b1d399074b64284d64786099; 69cfdc8df16ae63b7acba4ac6f727f78b86893c3; 055e3aa78a542c6cec016169f3011c2bf4e46932; 7cf64070fd3d7e53d80f260c10e6bd7018d580e1; ecfff30e570498b6c87c5d1319a0cbcdf7a8b86d; c7a9c7302a72301ed79a7c0696d5af2e03ad3ac4; ada81a4de88a6ce474df2e2446ad11fea480616e; ac7771c332da42b29a913b116bd6ef622cbf89cf; af1c871282ec122869d03f5420ef5d9143358a91; 6e754273d54a91371efbc928cd6b156364d517da; 966852963a88a28786b798c91b6662d6e501e590; 40795cf9508cc26e1fd47b71e14e40f2f1c71c11; f22d71c7ce9720ba1f717a4f1181488200e78198; - \textbf{Multi-Modal Convertor} | papers: 30cc95639cffca4ffa8c0eafbc502636c0c88fa5; 2313afae52d98e569da2dedbf14daf9efc74e7cf; 7b689adb8c156d6158660f90d1c86888ee281f63; 2b2d9ee18507aa89a7f1ecba0bf68844c7d9aa75; 6ae4705139494fcb6b790b6dd6c4225b40ee40f8; 60ee030773ba1b68eb222a265b052ca028353362; c020f15be1dee20f9e2e0c5a6f05f272b5508325; ebddfdc5d845a788e8062eddbbf7a335737cb99b; fa75a55760e6ea49b39b83cb85c99a22e1088254; 3803d1f291e162bdaa4678a2c5a2bbcf63c050f4; e7d09b6f2bc878cf2c993acf675f409d0b55f35a; ca6a2bc279be5a3349a22bfd6866ed633d18734b; ee0c9e8a935e047f2c030ecbfad93c2d80d642d7; e3fe61ce7a3c013de8770f7a43f3666f9a8e2ce5; 5d321194696f1f75cf9da045e6022b2f20ba5b9c; 3f5b31c4f7350dc88002c121aecbdc82f86eb5bb; 5ddb51ae85deca14dc7fc8adc07305c22a1ebe0a; 0983883619a0ca597d055d0e58da2f514052913d; 81e7e82245c2f230eeb8aaaa1a2b2604c143754a; ad13b213681b6f634bc83a264df246e83dd9a9d9; d6d3604f369bb0415cbe814e43ca3131323b03e2; 42a30dc5470f54ec249f25d3c31e05d7c376c8e3; d98536f24272e258b1d399074b64284d64786099; 69cfdc8df16ae63b7acba4ac6f727f78b86893c3;
